```plantuml
@startuml
class A
class C

interface Interface2 {
  void operation2()
  void operation3()
}

interface Interface1 {
  void operation1()
}

interface Interface3 {
  void operation4()
  void operation5()
}

class B
class D

A ..> Interface2
A ..> Interface1
C ..> Interface1
C ..> Interface3

Interface2 <|.. B
Interface1 <|.. B
Interface1 <|.. D
Interface3 <|.. D
@enduml
```
